visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair, wearing a blue and white patchwork cardigan over a white shirt, is standing in a brightly lit studio or office space. He holds a large, clear plastic bag and looks directly at the camera with an energetic expression. The background features a wooden table with some items and a large white photography umbrella light. (2) Through fast-motion editing, the man moves rapidly around the wooden table, appearing to frantically clean or collect items. Objects like tissues and glasses seem to disappear as he 'speeds' past. The lighting remains bright and consistent. (3) The scene shifts to a modern white kitchen. The man and a woman with long dark hair are interacting near a dishwasher. The man is expressive, pointing and gesturing, while the woman holds a small white bowl. (4) Close-up shots focusing on the DIKE brand dishwasher. A hand is seen pressing the digital touch buttons on the black and white interface. The dishwasher is shown filled with various bowls and plates. (5) Technical demonstration phase showing the internal spray arm of the dishwasher rotating. Another sequence shows apples and green fruit inside the machine being washed by water jets. (6) The man and woman stand together in the kitchen, surrounded by three different DIKE appliances: a dishwasher, a food waste processor, and a pressure cooker. They are smiling and holding up small pastel-colored containers toward the camera to show promotional items.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 欸 歐巴桑 請問一下. [Variety]: 欸 歐巴桑 請問一下. (2) [Subtitle]: 我在旁邊忙半天 你在旁邊做什麼. (3) [Subtitle]: 幫...幫忙... [Variety]: 幫...幫忙... (4) [Subtitle]: 你哪裡有在幫忙. [Variety]: 你哪裡有在幫忙. (5) [Subtitle]: 全部碗都我洗的這碗我洗的你要幫什麼忙碗也不會洗喔. (6) [Subtitle]: 我就慢慢...天氣涼涼的...洗碗手手會冰冰耶. [Variety]: 我就慢慢... 天氣涼涼的... 洗碗手手會冰冰耶. (7) [Subtitle]: 手會變粗粗啦 手會冰冰啦. (8) [Subtitle]: 不要藉口一堆 通通給我買這台. [Variety]: 不要藉口一堆 通通給我買這台. (9) [Slogan]: DIKE 全自動臭氧烘乾洗碗機. (10) [Subtitle]: 這台免安裝 即插即用. [Variety]: 這台免安裝 即插即用. (11) [Subtitle]: 不用受限只能放在廚房. (12) [Subtitle]: 360度全方位脈衝清洗. [Slogan]: 360度全方位脈衝清洗. (13) [Subtitle]: 12個強力噴水柱 環繞沖刷. [Slogan]: 12個強力噴水柱 環繞沖刷. (14) [Subtitle]: 不放過任何角落. (15) [Subtitle]: 6大智慧模式. [Variety]: 6大智慧模式. (16) [Subtitle]: 水果奶瓶都可洗. [Variety]: 水果奶瓶都可洗. (17) [Subtitle]: 簡易操作輕鬆上手. (18) [Subtitle]: 使用活性臭氧技術. (19) [Subtitle]: 消毒全面零死角 有效除去99.9%細菌. [Slogan]: 有效除去99.9%細菌. (20) [Subtitle]: 超大容量 搭配75度高溫烘乾功能. (21) [Subtitle]: 餐具長期存放 也乾淨衛生. [Variety]: 餐具長期存放 也乾淨衛生. (22) [Subtitle]: 省時省力啦 我跟你說 使用一次喔 這水電費 不到4塊錢. (23) [Subtitle]: CP值超級高. [Variety]: CP值超級高. (24) [Subtitle]: 難怪都放在辦公室 不拿來我們家用. (25) [Subtitle]: 大家當然搶著用 趕快 早買早享受. (26) [Subtitle]: 現在嘎哥的專屬母親節活動. [Variety]: 專屬母親節活動. (27) [Subtitle]: 廚房神器 限時優惠團購中. [Variety]: 廚房神器 限時優惠團購中. (28) [Slogan]: DIKE 2.5L 智能廚餘處理機. (29) [Slogan]: DIKE 5L 多功能萬用壓力鍋. (30) [Subtitle]: 一次解決所有廚房問題. (31) [Subtitle]: 還有四重好禮大放送 520折價券立即領. [Variety]: 四重好禮大放送. (32) [Subtitle]: 前100名再加碼送DIKE矽膠保鮮盒. (33) [Subtitle]: 還有100%D幣回饋 任兩件再享95折. (34) [Subtitle]: 趕快來嘎哥的IG首頁 點連結啦. (35) [Subtitle]: 現省千元馬上帶回家.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male primary creator and 1 female co-star.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man has brown hair and is wearing a light blue and white striped patchwork cardigan over a white t-shirt. The woman has long black hair and wears a black long-sleeved crop top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video alternates between a photographic studio area with a long wooden table and professional lighting, and a clean, modern kitchen with white tile backsplashes, shelving with plants, and various countertop appliances.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Loud rustling of a plastic bag occurs. A male voice begins speaking with high energy and an exaggerated comedic tone. A fast-paced, quirky synthesizer BGM begins playing in the background. (2) Multiple high-pitched 'whoosh' sound effects trigger as the man's speech becomes more rapid. The vocal delivery is sharp and high-arousal. (3) A distinct mechanical click and the sound of water flowing are heard. A playful, high-pitched female voice enters, speaking in a defensive but humorous tone. The BGM remains consistent and upbeat. (4) Electronic 'beeps' signify digital UI interactions. The male voice transitions into a more structured, enthusiastic promotional narrative. The tempo of the background music drives the rhythm. (5) A sharp 'ding' sound effect emphasizes key features. The vocal delivery is clear and professionally projected. Ambient sounds are minimal, suggesting a studio-produced track. (6) Both voices engage in a rapid, synchronized promotional call-to-action. Multiple 'pop' and 'magic' sound effects are used for emphasis as the BGM reaches a peak volume before fading out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Comedic Skit -> Product Feature Review -> Promotional Discount CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a series of DIKE brand kitchen appliances by leveraging a comedic skit about household chores to highlight consumer pain points, followed by a detailed technical showcase of the products' features and a limited-time Mother's Day discount.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct brand mentions, product close-ups, specific feature highlights, and a call-to-action with a discount link.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy, fast-cut commercial utilizing a popular influencer's established comedic persona to market household goods.
